MODULE: cosmos.core.quantum.search
FILE: cosmos/core/quantum/search.py (207 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Quantum-Inspired Search (Schrödinger's Query)
--------------------------------------------------------

"I finished the search before I even started it!"

This module implements a Quantum-Inspired Evolutionary Algorithm (QIEA) for reasoning path exploration.
Instead of binary states (explored

CLASSES:
- QuantumState(Enum)
- QBit: A quantum bit representing the probability of a reasoning step being valid.
|psi
  Methods: def measure(self) -> bool
  Methods: def rotate(self, theta: float)
- EntanglementGroup: Group of Q-bits that are entangled (correlated).
- SchrodingerSearch: Quantum-Inspired Search Engine for Reasoning Paths.
  Methods: def add_reasoning_node(self, id: str, content: str, initial_confidence: float=0.5)
  Methods: def entangle_nodes(self, id_a: str, id_b: str, strength: float=0.5)
  Methods: async def interfere(self, heuristic_fn: Callable[[str], float])
  Methods: def collapse(self) -> list[tuple[str, str, float]]
  Methods: def get_superposition_status(self) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def demo_quantum_search()
